faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
bruges: Medieval charm with canals, cobblestone streets, and world-famous chocolate shops.
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services.
ready.c: Ready for your next corporate ride?
faq.q1.question: What vehicles do you have?
faq.q1.answer: We offer mid-range vehicles (E-Class), luxury limousines (S-Class/V-Class), and group transport sprinters for 8 to 28 people.
faq.q2.question: Can we book multiple vehicles at once?
faq.q2.answer: Yes, absolutely! For weddings or events, we handle coordination and scheduling.
faq.q3.question: What is included in the prices?
faq.q3.answer: Standard water bottles, mints, chargers, and Wi-Fi in the car. Waiting time is included for airport arrivals (up to 60 min after landing) and the first 15 minutes are included for other services. After that, €60 per hour is charged. Special requests like child seats are negotiable.
faq.q4.question: Are you operational 24/7?
faq.q5.question: Do you also do trips abroad?
complete1: Complete step 1, then proceed to confirm your vehicle choice
faq.q6.question: Can we hire you for a tour or day trip?
faq.q6.answer: Yes, we offer customized tours with a chauffeur. Popular destinations: Keukenhof, Giethoorn, Zaanse Schans, Antwerp, Bruges, Brussels, Paris.
popular.destinations.desc: Choose from our curated multi-day tours or let us create a custom itinerary just for you
faq.q7.question: Can I book last minute?
faq.q7.answer: Yes, if there is availability. Please call for urgent requests.
faq.q8.question: Until when can I cancel free of charge?
faq.q8.answer: Up to 24 hours before the reservation. After that, we charge 100%.
faq.q9.question: What are the payment options?
faq.q9.answer: Payment link, credit card, debit card, or invoice for business travelers.

services.airport.title: Airport Transfers
services.airport.subtitle: First-class airport transportation.
services.airport.description: Enjoy first-class airport transportation with professional chauffeurs, real-time flight tracking, and flawless meet & greet service.
services.airport.hero.title: Your journey begins and ends stress-free
services.airport.hero.description: Whether you're arriving at Schiphol or catching a flight, we make sure your transfer is smooth, punctual, and luxurious, anytime, day or night. We monitor your flight in real time and adjust accordingly to delays or early arrivals. Our chauffeur greets you with a name sign, assists with your luggage, and guides you all the way to your door or terminal.
services.airport.features.meetgreet.desc: Be greeted with a personalized tablet sign and enjoy complimentary water, mints, and Wi-Fi in every ride.
services.airport.features.tracking.title: Live flight tracking
services.airport.features.tracking.desc: We adapt to your flight, not the other way around.
services.airport.features.luggage.title: Luggage assistance included
services.airport.features.luggage.desc: Full support at pick-up or drop-off.
services.airport.faq.q1.question: Do you wait for us if our flight is delayed?
services.airport.faq.q1.answer: Yes, absolutely! We monitor your flight in real-time and adjust our schedule accordingly. For arrivals, we include 60 minutes of free waiting time after landing. Our chauffeur will be there when you arrive, regardless of delays.
services.airport.faq.q2.question: How early should we book our airport transfer?
services.airport.faq.q2.answer: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance to guarantee availability. However, we also accept last-minute bookings based on availability. For urgent requests, please call us directly at +31 20 308 60 43.
services.corporate.faq.common: Common questions about our corporate transport service
services.corporate.faq.common.aiport: Common questions about our airport transfer service
ready.airport: Ready for your stress-free airport transfer?
ready.airport.desc: Book now and experience the difference of professional, luxury airport transportation.
ready.coorperate: Ready for your next corporate ride??
services.corporate.title: Corporate Transport
services.corporate.subtitle: Seamless corporate travel
services.corporate.description: Arrive in style with executive transport tailored for corporate rides which is punctual, professional, and perfectly organized.
services.corporate.hero.title: Your journey begins and ends stress-free
services.corporate.hero.description: Whether you're heading to a conference or a business event, we ensure your transfer is smooth, punctual, and luxurious at any hour, day or night. Our chauffeurs arrive early, assist with logistics on-site, and coordinate directly with your event schedule. From the first mile to the final destination, we provide discreet, first-class service every step of the way.
services.corporate.features.coordination: We adapt to your agenda, not the other way around.
services.corporate.features.professional: Multilingual, punctual, and impeccably presented chauffeurs.
services.corporate.features.logistics.de: Assistance with materials, luggage, and on-site coordination.
services.corporate.faq.q1.question: Can you coordinate with multiple pickup locations for our team?
services.corporate.faq.q1.answer: Yes, we specialize in coordinating complex corporate logistics. We can arrange multiple vehicles for different pickup points and ensure everyone arrives at the event simultaneously. Our team handles all the scheduling and communication.
services.corporate.faq.q2.question: We would like to travel with a large group at once, is that possible?
services.corporate.faq.q2.answer: Absolutely! We have Mercedes Sprinters with various capacities up to 28 seats. Additionally, you can also request multiple vehicles simultaneously.
services.sightseeing.title: Private Sightseeing
services.sightseeing.subtitle: Explore top sights
services.sightseeing.description: Explore iconic destinations in luxury and comfort with our professional chauffeurs who bring you to all locations stress-free.
services.sightseeing.hero.title: Discover hidden gems and iconic landmarks
services.sightseeing.hero.description: From Amsterdam's historic canals to the colorful tulip fields of Keukenhof, experience the Netherlands like never before. Our chauffeurs share local insights, handle all logistics, and ensure you capture every memorable moment in comfort and style.
services.sightseeing.locations.amsterdam: Historic canals, world-class museums, vibrant neighborhoods, and rich cultural heritage.
services.sightseeing.locations.keukenhof: Seasonal beauty at its finest with millions of blooming tulips and stunning garden displays.
services.sightseeing.locations.giethoorn: The 'Venice of the North' with peaceful waterways, thatched-roof houses, and serene boat rides.
services.sightseeing.locations.zaanse.de: Traditional Dutch village with historic windmills, cheese making, and authentic crafts.
services.sightseeing.locations.hague.des: International city of peace, royal palaces, and important government buildings.
services.sightseeing.locations.rotterdam: Modern architecture, innovative design, and Europe's largest port city.
services.sightseeing.faq.q1.question: Can we customize our sightseeing itinerary?
services.sightseeing.faq.q1.answer: We create personalized itineraries based on your interests, time available, and preferred pace. Whether you want to focus on art, history, nature, or local culture, we'll design the perfect day for you.
services.sightseeing.faq.q2.question: Are entrance fees to attractions included?
services.sightseeing.faq.q2.answer: Entrance fees to museums, gardens, and attractions are not included in our transport rate. However, our chauffeurs can assist with ticket purchases and often knows the best times to visit to avoid crowds.
services.touring.title: Luxury Touring
services.touring.subtitle: Multi-day luxury tours across Europe
services.touring.description: Experience extended journeys across multiple destinations with our professional chauffeurs, perfect for exploring Europe in ultimate comfort.
services.touring.hero.title: Your European adventure awaits
services.touring.hero.description: From multi-day Netherlands explorations to cross-border adventures through Belgium, Germany, and France, our luxury touring service offers the ultimate in comfort and flexibility. Travel at your own pace with expert local knowledge and seamless logistics handled for you.
services.touring.features.multiday.title: Multi-day itineraries
services.touring.features.multiday.desc: Extended tours from 2 days to 2 weeks, covering multiple destinations across Europe.
services.touring.features.expert.title: Expert local guides
services.touring.features.expert.desc: Knowledgeable chauffeur with deep local expertise and cultural insights.
services.touring.features.luxury.title: Luxury accommodations
services.touring.features.luxury.desc: We can arrange premium hotels and dining experiences throughout your journey.
services.touring.features.flexible.title: Flexible scheduling
services.touring.features.flexible.desc: Adapt your itinerary on the go based on weather, interests, or spontaneous discoveries.
We arrange luxury hotels and dining experiences throughout your journey.
services.touring.features.flexibility.de: Adjust your itinerary as you go, with the freedom to explore at your own pace.
services.touring.features.expertise.desc: Our chauffeurs share insider knowledge and hidden gems along the way.
services.touring.destinations.netherland: 3-5 day comprehensive tour covering Amsterdam, Keukenhof, Giethoorn, and traditional villages.
services.touring.destinations.benelux.de: 7-10 day tour through Netherlands, Belgium, and Luxembourg's highlights.
services.touring.destinations.europe.des: 10-14 day luxury tour visiting Amsterdam, Brussels, Paris, and other European gems.
services.touring.plans.netherlands.title: Grand Netherlands Tour
services.touring.plans.netherlands.desc: 3-5 days exploring Amsterdam, The Hague, Rotterdam, Keukenhof, and hidden gems throughout the country.
services.touring.plans.benelux.title: Benelux Adventure
services.touring.plans.benelux.desc: 5-7 days through Netherlands, Belgium, and Luxembourg, including Brussels, Antwerp, and Luxembourg City.
services.touring.plans.europe.title: European Grand Tour
services.touring.plans.europe.desc: 7-14 days across multiple European countries, customized to your interests and travel style.
services.touring.faq.q1.question: Do you arrange accommodations and dining for multi-day tours?
services.touring.faq.q1.answer: Yes, we can arrange luxury accommodations, restaurant reservations, and special experiences throughout your tour. We work with premium partners to ensure every aspect of your journey meets our high standards.
services.touring.faq.q2.question: What's included in the touring service pricing?
services.touring.faq.q2.answer: Our touring service includes the luxury vehicle, professional chauffeur, fuel, tolls, and parking. Accommodations, meals, entrance fees, and personal expenses are quoted separately based on your preferences and requirements.
services.group-events.title: Groups & Events
services.group-events.subtitle: Luxury group transportation for special occasions
services.group-events.description: Professional chauffeur services for weddings, corporate events, conferences, and celebrations with seamless coordination for groups of all sizes.
services.group-events.hero.title: Premium Groups & Event Transportation
services.group-events.hero.description: From intimate gatherings to large corporate events, we provide seamless luxury transportation for groups of all sizes. Our professional coordination ensures every guest arrives on time and in style.
Comprehensive transportation solutions for events spanning multiple days with dedicated vehicles.
services.group-events.features.expert.de: Professional event logistics and coordination services to ensure flawless execution.
services.group-events.features.luxury.de: Premium vehicles including Mercedes Sprinters, V-Class, and coaches for groups up to 89 passengers.
Customized solutions tailored to your specific event requirements and schedule.
services.group-events.destinations.nethe: Elegant transportation for your special day with luxury vehicles and professional service for the wedding party and guests.
services.group-events.destinations.benel: Executive transportation for conferences, seminars, and business gatherings with seamless logistics.
services.group-events.destinations.europ: Complete transportation solutions for concerts, sports events, and celebrations with multiple vehicle coordination.
services.group-events.faq.q1.question: How many people can you transport for a group event?
services.group-events.faq.q1.answer: We can accommodate groups from 1 to 100+ people with our diverse fleet including sedans, vans, Sprinters (up to 28 passengers), and coaches (up to 89 passengers). We can also coordinate multiple vehicles for larger groups.
services.group-events.faq.q2.question: Do you provide services for multi-day events?
services.group-events.faq.q2.answer: Yes, we specialize in multi-day event transportation with dedicated vehicles and drivers for the entire duration of your event. We handle all logistics and coordination to ensure seamless service throughout.

about.title: About Holland VIP Transfers
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for luxury transportation in the Netherlands and beyond.
about.hero.title: Excellence in luxury transport since 2003
about.hero.description: For over two decades, Holland VIP Transfers has been the premier choice for discerning travelers seeking reliable, luxurious, and professional transportation services. From our base in Amsterdam, we serve clients across the Netherlands and Europe with an unwavering commitment to excellence.
about.story.title: Our story
about.story.description: Founded in 2003 with a single Mercedes and a vision for exceptional service, Holland VIP Transfers has grown into the Netherlands' most trusted luxury transport company. We've built our reputation on three pillars: reliability, luxury, and personal service. Every journey we undertake reflects our commitment to exceeding expectations.
about.values.title: Our values
about.values.reliability.title: Reliability
about.values.reliability.desc: Punctuality and dependability in every service we provide.
about.values.luxury.title: Luxury
about.values.luxury.desc: Premium vehicles and first-class amenities for every journey.
about.values.service.title: Personal Service
about.values.service.desc: Tailored experiences that exceed your expectations.
about.values.professionalism.title: Professionalism
about.values.professionalism.desc: Discrete, courteous, and expertly trained chauffeurs.
about.stats.title: Our achievements
about.team.title: Why Choose Us?
about.team.experience.title: 20+ Years Of Experience
about.team.experience.desc: Serving over 1000 satisfied clients with excellence and building long-term relationships based on trust.
about.team.fleet.title: Premium fleet
about.team.fleet.desc: From executive sedans to luxury coaches, our vehicles are maintained to the highest standards.
about.team.chauffeurs.title: Professional Chauffeurs
about.team.chauffeurs.desc: Multilingual, punctual, and discreet drivers trained in hospitality and local knowledge.
about.team.service.title: 24/7 availability
about.team.service.desc: Round-the-clock service for all your transportation needs, whenever you need us.
about.contact.title: Ready to experience the difference?
about.contact.desc: Join thousands of satisfied clients who trust Holland VIP Transfers for their luxury transportation needs.
groupEvents.seo.title: Luxury Touring Amsterdam | Multi-Day VIP Transport Europe
groupEvents.seo.subtitle: Professional chauffeur service for multi-day luxury tours across Europe from Amsterdam
groupEvents.hero.title: Luxury Groups & Events
groupEvents.hero.description: Experience unforgettable journeys across Europe with our premium fleet of luxury buses. From intimate groups to large events, we provide exceptional comfort and service.
groupEvents.buses.bus16.name: Mercedes Sprinter 16 Seater
groupEvents.buses.bus16.description: Perfect for medium-sized groups, our 16-seater Mercedes Sprinter combines comfort with elegance. Ideal for corporate events, family gatherings, and sightseeing tours across Europe.
groupEvents.buses.bus20.name: Mercedes Sprinter 20 Seater
groupEvents.buses.bus20.description: Our 20-seater Mercedes Sprinter offers exceptional comfort for your group travels. Equipped with modern amenities and spacious seating for an unforgettable journey.
groupEvents.buses.bus23.name: Mercedes Sprinter 23 Seater
groupEvents.buses.bus23.description: Experience luxury travel with our 23-seater Mercedes Sprinter. Perfect for larger groups seeking comfort and style throughout their European adventure.
groupEvents.buses.bus28.name: Mercedes Sprinter 28 Seater
groupEvents.buses.bus28.description: Our flagship 28-seater Mercedes Sprinter is designed for maximum capacity without compromising on luxury. The ultimate choice for large groups & events and extended tours.
groupEvents.cta.title: Ready to Start Your European Adventure?
groupEvents.cta.description: Contact us today to plan your custom tour with our luxury fleet. We'll help you create an unforgettable journey.
